The specific statistic about resilience to supply chain disruptions was persuasive, though the shift was modest due to the already strong baseline opinion.

request_payload.exposure_text: As a former national security advisor, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy strengthens our defenses. When I worked on the 2024 NATO modernization task force, we found that countries with strong domestic tech sectors were 40% more resilient to supply chain disruptions. This isn't about isolation—it's about ensuring we can protect our citizens when allies might not always be available. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
